topic_title: Russia and Ukraine trade accusations over Victory Day ceasefire violations
topic_summary: As Russia commemorates the 81st anniversary of the defeat of Nazi Germany, both Moscow and Kyiv have accused each other of breaching a holiday ceasefire. Ukraine reports over 140 strikes and 10 assaults by Russian forces, while Russian officials claim they are conducting retaliatory strikes and expressed indignation over Volodymyr Zelensky's diplomatic activities in Yerevan.

findings.title: Trump upends Democrats' strategy on Iran war powers
findings.summary: President Trump's declaration that hostilities with Iran are "terminated" has thrown Democrats' strategy around congressional war powers into turmoil, Axios has learned.Why it matters: House Democrats, led by the Congressional Progressive Caucus, had been planning to force a war powers vote every day. It is now unclear whether that will — or even can — happen.Lawmakers involved in the war powers effort have been quietly reassessing how to approach the matter when Congress returns next week, a...
